creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the port update Oleg!

This appears to be a substantial bug fix / improved support releases. If that is the case and quarterly users should receive it, please set merge-quarterly flag to "?"


^Triage: 

- [tags] in issue Titles are deprecated
- maintainer-feedback flag (+) not required unless requested (?) first

- Please set the maintainer-approval attachment flag (to +) on patches for ports you maintain to signify approva, using:

  Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]
